title: narcissus albicans
intro: Narcissus albicans is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as a diuretic. The plant contains alkaloids such as galantamine, which has been shown to have potential health benefits, including improving cognitive function and reducing inflammation. Narcissus albicans can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
